data.name: Ody Mos
data.detailed_description:
A lewd physic-based 3D puzzle game where you move your characters to stuff all kind of toys into their butts.

Ody is a student in art history at the university while managing his own art gallery.
His favorite activity? Play with all kinds of dildos in the oddest places you can think of.
One day, he met this odd but happy girl called Esther.
Follow the two geckos through many places to have fun.

Features

  • Play 20 levels
  • Illustrated story
  • Original soundtrack
  • Lewd voice-acting (you better use headphones)
  • Silly challenges

data.short_description: A lewd physic-based 3D puzzle game where you move your characters to stuff all kind of toys into their butts.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 (SP1+), Windows 10 and Windows 11
  • 處理器: x86, x64 architecture with SSE2 instruction set support.
  • 顯示卡: DX10, DX11, DX12 capable.
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 157 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7 (SP1+), Windows 10 and Windows 11
  • Processor: x86, x64 architecture with SSE2 instruction set support.
  • Graphics: DX10, DX11, DX12 capable.
  • DirectX: Version 10
  • Storage: 157 MB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
